title: UN Comtrade API Vocabulary
description: Controlled vocabulary and domain terms used in the UN Comtrade API, covering trade types, classifications, flow codes, and parameter values.

typeCode.label: Trade Type Code
typeCode.description: Indicates whether the trade data covers physical goods (commodities) or intangible services.

values.C: Goods / Commodities — physical merchandise traded across borders
values.S: Services — intangible trade including transportation, travel, financial, insurance, and other services

freqCode.label: Frequency Code
freqCode.description: The reporting frequency of the trade data.

values.A: Annual — data aggregated for the full calendar year
values.M: Monthly — data reported on a month-by-month basis (YYYYMM format)

flowCode.label: Trade Flow Code
flowCode.description: The direction and type of trade transaction.

values.M: Import — goods entering the reporting country from the partner country
values.X: Export — goods leaving the reporting country to the partner country
values.MIP: Import (In-transit) — goods in transit through the reporting country
values.XIP: Export (In-transit) — goods exported while in transit through the reporting country
values.MOP: Import for Outward Processing — goods imported for processing and re-export
values.XOP: Export for Outward Processing — goods exported for processing abroad
values.RX: Re-export — previously imported goods exported to a third country

classificationCode.label: Commodity Classification Code
classificationCode.description: The international trade classification system and revision used to categorize commodities.

values.HS: Harmonized System (latest revision) — the WCO international customs classification standard
values.S4: SITC Revision 4 — Standard International Trade Classification

aggrLevel.label: Aggregation Level
aggrLevel.description: The level of commodity detail in the Harmonized System classification.

values.6: Sub-heading — 6-digit HS code (most granular internationally harmonized level)

format.label: Response Format
format.description: The output format for API responses.

values.csv: CSV — comma-separated values for spreadsheet use

breakdownMode.label: Breakdown Mode
breakdownMode.description: The column structure variant for trade data responses.

values.classic: Classic — legacy column structure compatible with original UN Comtrade format
values.plus: Plus — extended column structure with additional fields (default for Comtrade+)

partnerCode.label: Partner Country Code
partnerCode.description: UN M49 numeric code for the trading partner country.

specialValues.0: World — aggregate of all partner countries
specialValues.290: Areas NES — areas not elsewhere specified

reporterCode.label: Reporter Country Code
reporterCode.description: UN M49 numeric code for the country reporting the trade data. M49 codes align with ISO 3166-1 for most countries.

valueTypes.label: Trade Value Types
valueTypes.description: Methods of valuing trade transactions used in UN Comtrade data.

values.fobvalue: FOB (Free On Board) — export value at the point of departure; does not include international freight and insurance
values.cifvalue: CIF (Cost, Insurance, Freight) — import value at the point of destination; includes international freight and insurance costs
values.primaryValue: Primary Value — the main trade value reported (FOB for exports, CIF for imports)
